subject: Series B Funding Round - Due Diligence Update
body:
Hi Board,

Update on our Series B process. We've received term sheets from three VCs:

1. Sequoia Capital: $30M at $150M pre-money, 1x non-participating preferred
2. Andreessen Horowitz: $25M at $140M pre-money, 1x participating preferred with 3x cap
3. Accel Partners: $35M at $160M pre-money, 1x non-participating preferred

Due diligence is progressing well. All three firms have completed their technical review and are now in financial DD. Key metrics they're focused on:
- Net revenue retention: 125%
- Gross margin: 78%
- CAC payback period: 14 months
- Rule of 40 score: 52

I recommend we proceed with Accel given the higher valuation and founder-friendly terms. Targeting close by end of April.
